title: Function-like macros should be avoided
description: Function-like macros should not be usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellcppcoreguidelinesbased-on-misrapreprocessorbad-practicecertWhy is this an issue?More InfoEven if function-like macros may look similar to functions, they work differently. For example, functions provide parameter type-checking, whereas macros do not. Furthermore, since macros result in textual replacements, the code within a macro argument may be evaluated multiple times or in unexpected ways.Generally, functions provide a more secure and reliable mechanism than function-like macros.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
